hero.description: Experienced in building scalable applications using Node.js, NestJS, and React. Strong focus on process optimization through automation and data analysis.

0.description: Comprehensive development of a financial aid platform (Control) using MVC. Built backend with NestJS & PostgreSQL, and modern UI with React & Shadcn. Strict use of TypeScript for robustness.

1.description: Automated financial workflows via Google AppsScript, integrating APIs to Google Sheets. Developed and deployed static websites optimized on Cloudflare.

2.description: Technical leadership in creating automation scripts for large-scale projects (Mercado Libre, Nuqlea). Optimized data entry and processing with Python and SQL. Data visualization with Google Cloud.

ctrl-x.title: Control (Fintech)
ctrl-x.description: A web application for controlling personal financial movements for a small business. Built with TypeScript, NestJS, PostgreSQL, React, Shadcn, Tailwind.

pasos.title: Pasos (System Management)
pasos.description: Full Stack backoffice application for a team of psychologists to track patient records and data entries.

yt-audio-downloader.title: YT Audio Downloader
yt-audio-downloader.description: High-performance YouTube audio extraction tool with a Rust backend for efficient processing.

codecrafters-shell.title: Java Shell Implementation
codecrafters-shell.description: A custom low-level Shell implementation in Java, demonstrating deep knowledge of operating systems. Built for the Codecrafters Shell Challenge.

media-aggregator.title: Media Aggregator
media-aggregator.description: Desktop application built with Electron and SQLite to manage and visualize local multimedia resources.
